UpdateSourceArgs: -c "set -e; DOTNET_DIR=\"{{$FullBaseDir}}dotnet\"; DOTNET_BIN=\"$DOTNET_DIR/dotnet\"; if [[ -x \"$DOTNET_BIN\" ]]; then InstalledVersion=$($DOTNET_BIN --list-runtimes | grep -oP 'Microsoft.NETCore.App \K[\d.]+' | tail -1); else InstalledVersion=\"\"; fi; LatestVersion=$(wget -qO- https://builds.dotnet.microsoft.com/dotnet/release-metadata/8.0/releases.json | grep -oP '\"latest-runtime\":\s*\"\K[^\"]+'); echo \"Installed: $InstalledVersion, Latest: $LatestVersion\"; if [[ \"$InstalledVersion\" == \"$LatestVersion\" ]]; then echo \".NET Runtime v$LatestVersion already installed. Skipping\" && exit 0; fi; wget -qO \"{{$FullBaseDir}}dotnet.tar.gz\" https://builds.dotnet.microsoft.com/dotnet/Runtime/$LatestVersion/dotnet-runtime-$LatestVersion-linux-x64.tar.gz || { echo \"Download failed. Aborting\"; exit 1; }; rm -rf \"$DOTNET_DIR\"/* && tar -xzf \"{{$FullBaseDir}}dotnet.tar.gz\" -C \"$DOTNET_DIR\" && rm -f \"{{$FullBaseDir}}dotnet.tar.gz\" && echo \".NET Runtime v$LatestVersion installed\""
